name: aimeflux
title: AimeFlux
description: Control the AimeFlux CLI from Raycast.
author: erdiegoant

commands.name: start-dictation
commands.title: Start Dictation
commands.subtitle: AimeFlux
commands.description: Start AimeFlux dictation with optional mode and LLM cleanup.

commands.name: stop-dictation
commands.title: Stop Dictation
commands.subtitle: AimeFlux
commands.description: Stop the active AimeFlux dictation session.

commands.name: toggle-llm-cleanup
commands.title: Toggle LLM Cleanup
commands.subtitle: AimeFlux
commands.description: Toggle the global AimeFlux LLM cleanup setting.

commands.name: process-text
commands.title: Process Text
commands.subtitle: AimeFlux
commands.description: Run one-off text processing with your configured AimeFlux modes.

commands.name: browse-history
commands.title: Browse History
commands.subtitle: AimeFlux
commands.description: Browse AimeFlux history with inline mode filtering and item actions.

commands.name: copy-latest-history-item
commands.title: Copy Latest History Item
commands.subtitle: AimeFlux
commands.description: Copy the newest history item from AimeFlux.

commands.name: paste-latest-history-item
commands.title: Paste Latest History Item
commands.subtitle: AimeFlux
commands.description: Paste the newest history item into the frontmost application.

commands.name: import-text-into-history
commands.title: Import Text into History
commands.subtitle: AimeFlux
commands.description: Import inline text into AimeFlux history.

commands.name: show-current-mode
commands.title: Show Current Mode
commands.subtitle: AimeFlux
commands.description: Show the active manual mode and switch to another one.

commands.name: set-current-mode
commands.title: Set Current Mode
commands.subtitle: AimeFlux
commands.description: Change the active manual mode by name or ID.

commands.name: show-mode
commands.title: Show Mode
commands.subtitle: AimeFlux
commands.description: Inspect a mode with prompt, vocabulary, and replacement details.

commands.name: list-installed-models
commands.title: List Installed Models
commands.subtitle: AimeFlux
commands.description: Browse installed Whisper models and remove models that are not in active use.

commands.name: list-replacements
commands.title: List Replacements
commands.subtitle: AimeFlux
commands.description: Browse configured replacements and remove them in context.

commands.name: add-replacement
commands.title: Add Replacement
commands.subtitle: AimeFlux
commands.description: Add a global or mode-specific deterministic replacement.
